steps.title: Recognize the though clause
steps.content: The sentence says OHD requires careful calibration based on context and composition, though several factors affect rind growth. The word "though" introduces a dependent contrast clause.

steps.title: Do not split the clause
steps.content: A incorrectly separates "though" from the clause it introduces. B puts a colon before a subordinating conjunction. C uses a semicolon before a dependent clause. No punctuation is needed between "composition" and "though." The answer is D.
